nodes.label: Intercept NOTIFY_DEBUGGER_ABOUT_RX_PAGES and touch the pages.
nodes.norm_label: intercept notify_debugger_about_rx_pages and touch the pages.

nodes.label: Web Entry Point
nodes.rationale: Placeholder for base href to be replaced by flutter build.

nodes.label: Windows Project CMake
nodes.rationale: Uses Unicode for all projects; opts in to modern CMake behaviors (3.14...3.25).

nodes.label: FlutterWindow
nodes.rationale: A window that does nothing but host a Flutter view, specializing Win32Window for Flutter content.

nodes.label: High DPI Awareness
nodes.rationale: Supports PerMonitor V1 awareness mode by dynamically loading EnableNonClientDpiScaling from User32.dll.

nodes.label: ScannerController
nodes.rationale: Implements throttling (800ms) to prevent overlapping inference frames.

nodes.label: FruitAnalyzerService
nodes.rationale: Uses TFLite Interpreter to run inference on fruit images with MobileNetV2-based models.

nodes.label: AppConfig
nodes.rationale: Centralizes model configuration and metadata in a ModelRegistry.

nodes.label: LabelMapping
nodes.rationale: Decouples raw model labels from human-readable Indonesian strings.
